verses.text: Vantung mi nihte Sodom-ah nitakin hong tung a, Sodom khua kulhkongpi-ah Lot na tu hi. Lot in amaute a muh ciangin, amaute a dawn dingin ding a, leilakah a mai ngatin kun a

“Ka tote aw, kong thum hi. Na nasempa' inn lamah hong kihei-in hong giak un la, na khete uh sil un. Tua ciangin zingsangin tho baihin na paina ding lam uhah pai pan un,” a ci hi. Amaute in, “Hilo hi; khua lakah ka giak ding uh hi,” a ci uh hi
Ahih hangin amah in amaute nakpi takin kun ahih manin ama lamah kihei uh a, ama inn-ah a lut uh hi. Amah in amaute-a' dingin an bawl a, silngo sawhloh anlum emsak a, amaute in a ne uh hi
Ahih hangin amaute' lup ma-in Sodom khua mite, a moi a hamin mi khempeuh in a inn umcih uh hi
Amaute in Lot sam uh a, “Tu nitaka nang kiangah hong tung mite koi-ah om ahi hiam? Amau' taw ka luk theihna dingun ko kiangah amaute hong paikhiatpih in,” a ci uh hi
Lot, kongkhak pua-ah mite kiangah pai-in kong lehkhak a
“Ka sanggamte aw, tua banga na gitloh gamtat lohna ding uh kong thum hi

En un, ta nungak nih ka nei hi. No kiangah amaute hong paikhiatpihsak un la, na ut bangun amaute tungah gamta un. Hih mite' tungah bangmah gamta kei bek un. Bang hang hiam cih leh amaute, keima innsung hong tungkhin uh ahih manin ka hut ding kisam hi,” a ci hi

Ahih hangin amaute in, “Taikhia in. Kote kiangah hong peem pak a, tu-in nang thukhen hong kineih ding na hi hiam? Tu-in amaute sangin nang kong siatbawl zaw ding uh hi,” a ci uh hi. Tua ciangin amaute in nakpi takin Lot' lam hong neh uh a, kongkhak a phukham zah dongin hong neh uh hi
Ahih hangin mi nihte in amau' khut hong zanin innsung amau' kiangah Lot paipihin kong khak uh hi
Inn kongkhakah a om mi a lian a neute, amaute in a mit uh tawsak uh hi. Tua ahih ciangin kongkhak a zawtzawt hangun mu zolo uh hi.
Tua ciangin mi nihte in Lot kiangah, “Hih lai-ah tanau dang na nei hiam? Makte, tapate, ahih kei leh khua sunga nang' mi peuhpeuh hih mun panin paikhiatpih in
Bang hang hiam cih leh hih mite a kimawhsakna thu Topa' tungah tung khin a, a susia dingin Topa in hong sawl khin ahih ciangin hih khua a susia ta ding ka hi uh hi,” a ci uh hi

Tua ahih ciangin Lot paikhia-in a tanute a ten'pih dingte kiangah, “Manlangin hih khua panin paikhia un. Bang hang hiam cih leh Topa in hih khuapi a susia ding hi ta hi,” a ci hi. Ahih hangin amah pen a mak dingte tungah a ciamnui bang lel hi
Zingsang khuavak ciangin vantung mite in, “Khuapi gimpiakna sungah kangtum khading na hih uh ciangin kinawh in la, hih lai-a om na zi leh na tanute la in,” ci-in Lot sawl hamtang uh hi

Ahih hangin amah lungka-in omlai veve hi. Ahi zongin Topa in ama tungah hehpihna nei ahih manin, mite in amah leh a zi leh a tanu nihte a khut uh tawh manin, amaute in amah paikhiatpihin khua pualamah koih uh hi
Amaute in a paikhiatpih khit uh ciangin, “Na nuntakna dingun tai un. Nunghei kei un la, kuam sungah zong khawl kei un. Note hong kangtum khading ahih manin mualtungah taito un,” a ci uh hi
Ahi zongin Lot in amaute tungah, “Hilo hi, ka tote aw

en un, note' muhna-ah na nasempa in maipha muzo a, ka nuntakna nong hutna uhah migitna lianpi kei tungah nong lak khin uh hi. Ahih hangin mualtung gamla ahih manin ka tun' ma-in siatna in kei hong pha-in ka si ding hi
En un, gal-a om khuapi, taina dingin nai a, khuapi neu khat ahi hi. Tua lai-ah hong taisak un — khuapi neu khat hilo ahi hiam? — tua hi leh ka suakta ding hi,” a ci hi
Amah in ama kiangah, “En in, na gensa khuapi ka lumlet lohna ding, hih maipha zong nang kong pia hi
Kinawh in la, tua lai-ah tai in. Bang hang hiam cih leh tua lai-ah nang na tun' mateng ke'n bangmah ka hih thei kei hi,” a ci hi. Tua ahih ciangin tua khuapi min Zoar kici hi
Zoar-ah Lot a tun' ciangin tua lai-ah ni suak khinta hi
Tua ciangin Topa in vantung panin Sodom leh Gomorrah khuate tungah kaat leh meikuang zusak hi
Amah in tua khuapite, kuamte khempeuh, khuapite sunga mi tengte khempeuh leh leitunga a po khempeuh a susia hi
Ahih hangin a nunga om Lot' zi nunghei a, amah ci khuam a suak hi
Topa' mai-a a din'nasa munah zingsang tungin Abraham va pai hi
Sodom leh Gomorrah leh kuamte khempeuh lam nga sukin khuadak a, leitang khu pen, meiphualpi khu bangin a kah to a mu hi
Pasian in kuam sunga khuapite a suksiat lai-in, amah in Abraham phawk a, amah in Lot' ten'na khuapite a suksiat ciangin tua bang a suksiatna sung panin Lot sawlkhia ahih manin a suakta ahi hi.

sections.sectionTitle: Moab mite leh Ammon mite' Pian'na

verses.text: Tu-in Zoar panin Lot paikhia to-in a tanu nihte tawh mualtungah a teng hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh Zoar-ah a ten' ding lau hi. Tua ahih ciangin a tanu nihte tawh suanghawm sung khatah a teng uh hi
A u pen in a nau tungah, “I pa lah teek ta a, leitung ngeina bangin eite hong luppih ding pasal khat zong omlo hi
Hong pai in; i pa leenggahzu khamsak ni; i pa tawh suanlekhak i kizopsak theihna dingin amah tawh lumkhawm ni,” a ci hi
Tua ahih ciangin amaute in tua nitakin a pa uh leenggahzu khamsak uh hi. A unu pai-in a pa tawh lum hi. A tanu a luplam hita leh a thawhlam hita leh amah in phawklo hi

A zing ciangin a u in a nau tungah, “En in, zan zanin i pa tawh ka lum hi. Tu nitakin zong amah leenggahzu khamsak leuleu ni. Tua ciangin nang pai in la, i pa tawh suanlekhak i kizopsak theihna dingin amah tawh lumkhawm in,” a ci hi
Tua ahih ciangin amaute in tua nitakin zong a pa uh leenggahzu khamsak uh hi. A nau pai-in amah tawh lum hi. A tanu a luplam hita leh a thawhlam hita leh amah in phawklo hi
Tua ahih ciangin Lot' tanute gel in a pa uh tawh naupaii uh hi
A u in tapa khat nei-in a min Moab phuak a, amah pen tuhuna Moab mite' pian'na pupi ahi hi
A nau in zong tapa khat nei-in a min Benammi phuak a, amah pen tudonga Ammon mite' pian'na pupi ahi hi.
